info.title: Mintlify Admin API
info.description: An API for administrative operations including documentation updates and agent management.

post.description: Deprecated: use [v2 create agent job](/api/agent/v2/create-agent-job) instead. Creates a new agent job that can generate and edit documentation based on provided messages and branch information.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: Your project ID. Can be copied from the [API keys](https://dashboard.mintlify.com/settings/organization/api-keys) page in your dashboard.

branch.description: The name of the Git branch that the agent should work on. If omitted, the agent generates a branch name based on the message content.

messages.description: A list of messages to provide to the agent. A default system prompt is always prepended automatically, so you typically only need to include user messages.

role.description: The role of the message sender. Use `user` for task instructions. Use `system` to add supplementary instructions that are appended after the default system prompt (does not replace it). Use `assistant` to provide example assistant responses for few-shot prompting.

asDraft.description: Control whether the pull request is created in draft or non-draft mode. When true, creates a draft pull request. When false (default), creates a regular pull request ready for review.

model.description: The AI model to use for the agent job. Use `sonnet` for faster, cost-effective processing. Use `opus` for more capable, but slower processing.

200.description: Agent job created successfully. Returns a streaming response with Server-Sent Events.

X-Session-Id.description: Unique session identifier for the created agent job.

X-Branch-Name.description: Git branch name where the agent is making changes.

schema.description: Server-Sent Events stream containing the agent job execution details and results.

get.description: Deprecated: use [v2 get agent job](/api/agent/v2/get-agent-job) instead. Retrieves the details and status of a specific agent job by its ID.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: Your project ID. Can be copied from the [API keys](https://dashboard.mintlify.com/settings/organization/api-keys) page in your dashboard.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the agent job to retrieve.

sessionId.description: The subdomain this session belongs to.

subdomain.description: The subdomain this session belongs to.

branch.description: Git branch name where changes were made.

haulted.description: Whether the session execution was halted.

haultReason.description: Reason for session halt. `processing` indicates the job is still running. `interrupted` indicates the job was manually interrupted.

pullRequestLink.description: Link to the created pull request.

messageToUser.description: Message for the user about the session outcome.

todos.description: List of todo items from the session.

id.description: Unique identifier for the todo item.

userId.description: The ID of the user who created this session, if available.

title.description: A generated title summarizing the agent job.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the session was created.

get.description: Deprecated: use [v2 get agent job](/api/agent/v2/get-agent-job) instead. Retrieves all agent jobs for the specified domain, including their status and details.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: Your project ID. Can be copied from the [API keys](https://dashboard.mintlify.com/settings/organization/api-keys) page in your dashboard.

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Number of results to skip for pagination.

parameters.name: take
parameters.description: Number of results to return. Maximum 100.

allSessions.description: Array of all agent sessions for the domain.

sessionId.description: The subdomain this session belongs to.

subdomain.description: The subdomain this session belongs to.

branch.description: Git branch name where changes were made.

haulted.description: Whether the session execution was halted.

haultReason.description: Reason for session halt. `processing` indicates the job is still running. `interrupted` indicates the job was manually interrupted.

pullRequestLink.description: Link to the created pull request.

messageToUser.description: Message for the user about the session outcome.

todos.description: List of todo items from the session.

id.description: Unique identifier for the todo item.

userId.description: The ID of the user who created this session, if available.

title.description: A generated title summarizing the agent job.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the session was created.

post.description: Creates a new agent job that runs in the background. The job processes the prompt asynchronously — poll the get job endpoint to track progress. If the agent edits files successfully, a pull request is automatically created.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: Your project ID. Can be copied from the [API keys](https://dashboard.mintlify.com/settings/organization/api-keys) page in your dashboard.

prompt.description: The instruction for the agent to execute.

get.description: Retrieves the current status and details of an agent job. Poll this endpoint to track job progress.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: Your project ID. Can be copied from the [API keys](https://dashboard.mintlify.com/settings/organization/api-keys) page in your dashboard.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the agent job.

post.description: Sends a follow-up message to an existing agent job. The message is processed asynchronously — poll the get job endpoint to track progress.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: Your project ID. Can be copied from the [API keys](https://dashboard.mintlify.com/settings/organization/api-keys) page in your dashboard.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the agent job to send a message to.

prompt.description: The follow-up instruction for the agent.

id.description: Unique identifier for the agent job.

status.description: Current status of the job. `active` — the agent is currently processing the prompt. `completed` — the agent finished successfully and a PR may have been created (check `prLink`). `archived` — the job has been archived. `failed` — the agent encountered an unrecoverable error. Poll until status is `completed`, `archived`, or `failed`.

repository.description: Full URL of the GitHub repository.

ref.description: Git branch the agent is working on.

model.description: The AI model used for this job.

prLink.description: GitHub pull request URL created by the agent. `null` while the job is still `active` or if no files were changed. Populated once the agent successfully creates a PR.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the job was created.

archivedAt.description: Timestamp when the job was archived.

bearerAuth.description: The Authorization header expects a Bearer token. Use an admin API key (prefixed with `mint_`). This is a server-side secret key. Generate one on the [API keys page](https://dashboard.mintlify.com/settings/organization/api-keys) in your dashboard.
